message:
chore: remove unused imports and suppress dead-code warnings

Remove unused imports from ars_federation, replay_mcp, replay_robot,
replay_shadow_rollout, and replay_test_orchestrator. Prefix unused
functions memchr_newline and evaluate_result with underscore in
latency_stages. Prefix unused parameter current_age_days in
evaluate_retention. Remove debug_assert!(false) from VersionedStore::push
that panicked in debug builds on timestamp regression despite the code
already handling it via clamping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
